examples: I kicked my son because of his wantonness.
Not thou, vain Lord of wantonness and ease!
For an act to be evil, it must be significantly wrong, embarked upon with full knowledge of its wantonness and embraced wholeheartedly by the person doing the deed.
That is if you consider success to come in the form of views as in how many people viewed a particular video you posted to YouTube which personified your wantonness to take it to the streets.
